BÉEÉ.+ÉÉ. 806(+É), iÉÉ®ÉÒJÉ 11 ÉÊºÉiÉÆ¤É®, 1998 2. BÉEÉ.+ÉÉ. 238(+É), iÉÉ®ÉÒJÉ 22 {ÉE®´É®ÉÒ, 2005 3. BÉEÉ.+ÉÉ. 961(+É), iÉÉ®ÉÒJÉ 12 VÉÚxÉ, 2007 4. BÉEÉ.+ÉÉ. 2835(+É), iÉÉ®ÉÒJÉ 3 ÉÊnºÉÆ¤É®, 2008 5. BÉEÉ.+ÉÉ. 379(+É), iÉÉ®ÉÒJÉ 15 {ÉE®´É®ÉÒ, 2013 * MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th April, 2014 S.O. 1038(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 32 of the Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority Act, 1985 (2 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1986, namely :— (1) These rules may be called the Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority (Amendment) Rules, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication, in the Official Gazette. 1. In the Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority Rules, 1986, for rules 6 and 7 the following rules shall be substituted, namely:— Powers and duties of Chairman and Secretary 6. Powers and duties of the Chairman—The Chairman shall, (i) grant leave to Secretary, officers and employees of the Authority; (ii) prescribe duties of all officers and employees of the Authority and exercise such supervision and disciplinary control as may be necessary; and (iii) sanction expenditure for contingencies, supplies and services and purchase of articles required for the working of the office of the Authority. -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3 (ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 7. Duties of Secretary—The Secretary shall, (i) attend all the meetings of the Authority and shall assist Chairman in implementing the decisions of the Authority; (ii) maintain a proper record of the proceedings of the meetings of the Authority and decisions taken in those meetings; (iii) maintain proper record of the register of exporters in accordance with the provisions of Chapter III of the Act; (iv) issue receipts on behalf of the Authority for all moneys received under Act; (v) maintain or cause to be maintained an account of the receipts and expenditure of the Authority; and (vi) be responsible for preparation of draft Annual report on the working of the Authority and its submission to Central Government after approval by the Authority on a date not later than the date specified in this behalf by the Central Government. [F. No. A-12022/24/2007-E. IV (Vol. II)] A. K. TRIPATHY, Jt. Secy. Note :—The principal rules were published in the Official Gazette vide S.O. 652(E), dated the 3rd day of September, 1986 and the amendment rules were published by the following notifications, namely:— 1. S.O. 806(E), dated the 11th day of September, 1998 2. S.O. 238(E), dated the 22nd day of February, 2005 3. S.O. 961(E), dated the 12th day of June, 2007 4. S.O. 2835(E), dated the 3rd day of December, 2008 5. S.O. 379(E), dated the 15th day of February, 2013.
